sentence_reviews.text: Energy-based, Hopfield, and Boltzmann models assign scalar compatibility to configurations and perform recall or generation by moving toward lower-energy states.
sentence_reviews.evidence_location: Deep Learning energy-based models/Boltzmann machines; PML energy-based probabilistic modeling topics.
sentence_reviews.notes: Energy assignments and lower-energy inference/generation are supported; Hopfield recall plus Boltzmann generation are synthesized across model families.

sentence_reviews.text: The role of Energy-based, Hopfield & Boltzmann models is to connect Energy-based objectives, Recurrence & feedback state to downstream capabilities including Time-series forecasting, anomaly & fraud detection.
sentence_reviews.evidence_location: Deep Learning energy-based/recurrent model discussions; PML probabilistic modeling.
sentence_reviews.notes: Energy and recurrence connections are supported; time-series, anomaly, and fraud downstream uses are not directly established.

sentence_reviews.text: substrate for Time-series forecasting, anomaly & fraud detection
sentence_reviews.evidence_location: General energy-based and probabilistic modeling background.
sentence_reviews.notes: The cited packet sources do not directly support this specific downstream application bundle.

sentence_reviews.evidence_location: Deep Learning energy-based models; PML energy-based models.
sentence_reviews.notes: Energy objectives are definitional for this node.

sentence_reviews.text: Its inductive bias, data demand, optimization behavior, and compute profile can make it unsuitable outside the regimes where it was validated. Its direct dependencies include Energy-based objectives, Recurrence & feedback state.
sentence_reviews.evidence_location: Energy-based and recurrent model background in cited sources.
sentence_reviews.notes: Dependencies are supported; the broad limitation statement is generic.

sentence_reviews.text: Energy-based, Hopfield & Boltzmann models is learned, selected, or evaluated using the objective family Energy-based objectives.
sentence_reviews.notes: Directly supported for energy-based/Boltzmann models and compatible with Hopfield energy minimization.

sentence_reviews.text: Energy-based, Hopfield & Boltzmann models is assembled in part from the mechanism or model component Recurrence & feedback state.
sentence_reviews.evidence_location: Deep Learning recurrent models and energy-based model chapters.
sentence_reviews.notes: Hopfield networks are recurrent feedback systems; the combined node makes recurrence core for part of the family.

sentence_reviews.text: Energy-based, Hopfield & Boltzmann models is assembled in part from the mechanism or model component Differentiable memory read/write.
sentence_reviews.notes: The cited packet evidence does not directly show differentiable memory read/write as a component of these models.

edge_reviews.notes: composes/core is supported for Hopfield-style recurrent energy dynamics but not all energy-based models.
Differentiable memory read/write is not adequately supported as a dependency by the packet sources.
